case_title: CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION vs. MARKPOL, TAPANAPONG et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION INTER-INSUINTER-INSURANCE BUREAU AS TO DEFENDANT MARKPOL, TAPANAPONG DOES ONE THROUGH FIVE, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-15-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-17-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-26-1996

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER EXTENDING TIME TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON COMPLAINT, ORDER GRANTED BY JUDGE WICK FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION INTER-INSUINTER-INSURANCE BUREAU TIME TO FILE EXTENDED UNTIL AUG-16-1996

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARKPOL, TAPANAPONG $2,388.51 PRINCIPAL, $520.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $97.51 INTEREST, $108.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,114.02

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $108.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MARKPOL, TAPANAPONG
